name: com.maxenceguidez.mxunikit.singleton
description: Provides a set of singleton implementations for a project. It covers plain C# class singletons, persistent MonoBehaviour singletons, and scene-scoped singletons, all with explicit lifecycle hooks. This avoids re-implementing the same singleton boilerplate in every project.

samples.description: Demonstrates normal class singletons, persistent MonoBehaviour singletons, and scene-scoped singletons.
